task_context.actionable_question: When exactly did this student start disengaging?
task_context.ai_prompt_hint: Flag the exact week engagement dropped. Compare to pre-drop average. Recommend admin outreach timing.

explanation.raw_text:
Summary: The student's engagement trajectory reveals a significant decline in weekly clicks, particularly starting from week 0, where a drastic drop of 67% was observed. This disengagement trend continued with fluctuations, indicating a concerning pattern of inconsistent engagement.

Insights: Significant Engagement Drop: The most notable decline in engagement occurred in week 0, where weekly clicks fell from 94 to 27, marking a 67% decrease compared to the previous week. This drop is indicative of a potential disengagement from course activities. | Fluctuating Engagement Post-Drop: Following the initial drop, engagement fluctuated with a peak of 98 clicks in week 1, but subsequently dropped again to 4 clicks in week 2. This inconsistency suggests a lack of sustained engagement.

Educational implications: The significant drop in engagement suggests that students may require additional support and intervention to maintain consistent participation in the course.

Recommendations: high - Initiate outreach to the student during week 1 to address potential barriers to engagement. - Engagement dropped significantly in week 0, and timely outreach could help re-engage the student before further decline.

insights.title: Significant Engagement Drop
insights.description: The most notable decline in engagement occurred in week 0, where weekly clicks fell from 94 to 27, marking a 67% decrease compared to the previous week. This drop is indicative of a potential disengagement from course activities.

insights.title: Fluctuating Engagement Post-Drop
insights.description: Following the initial drop, engagement fluctuated with a peak of 98 clicks in week 1, but subsequently dropped again to 4 clicks in week 2. This inconsistency suggests a lack of sustained engagement.

educational_implications: The significant drop in engagement suggests that students may require additional support and intervention to maintain consistent participation in the course.

recommendations.action: Initiate outreach to the student during week 1 to address potential barriers to engagement.

confidence.reason: The analysis is based on a comprehensive dataset with clear engagement metrics over multiple weeks.

required_core_outputs.description: Identify the specific week in which engagement dropped when the data supports one.
Compare engagement after the drop with the pre-drop average.

required_supporting_outputs.description: When a specific drop week is identified, recommend outreach timing relative to that week.

evaluation_requirements.safety_fairness_note: Conservative pilot default; human review is required before any not_applicable exception.
